name: JEPA-Inspired Silicon Sandbox
description: Host-only local market-vision simulations powered by a JEPA-inspired Python engine and the local python3 runtime.

scratchDir.description: Ephemeral working directory for session state. Leading ~ is expanded at plugin-register time.

outputDir.description: Durable output directory for run artifacts. Leading ~ is expanded at plugin-register time.

agentName.description: Display name used by Market Vision reports.

defaultDelayMs.description: Reserved lifecycle setting kept for compatibility.
